message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User Agent" as UA
interface "Content Upload API" as API
database "Content database" as DB
interface "CAFF Parser" as Parser

note right of API
MUST also include a CSRF token to prevent users of other,
potentially XSS vulnerable sites to take part in a massive distributed spam or DoS operation.
end note

UA -> API: Upload request (HTTP POST),\ncontains a single CAFF file in its body.

activate API
API -> Parser: Validate upload request
activate Parser
Parser --> API: Return result
deactivate Parser

alt [Failed to validate uploaded content]
  API --> UA: Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.
else [Request is deemed valid]
  note right of API
  Uploads should be validated by at LEAST:\n* Content-Size header against max file size.\n* All size fields against their respective supported bounds.\n* Structure of all fields match expectations from the spec.\n* Number of bytes from the upload matches number of bytes expected from in-file metadata.
  end note

  API -> DB: Store content in database
  activate DB
  DB --> API: Return result of request
  deactivate DB

  alt [Upload succeeded]
    API --> UA: Return HTTP 201 Created
  else
    API --> UA: Return HTTP status code signaling the reason for failure.
  end
end

deactivate API

note left of UA
end note

@enduml
